1	#
2	# CI build that assembles artifacts and runs tests.
3	# If validation is successful this workflow releases from the main dev branch.
4	#
5	# - skipping CI: add [skip ci] to the commit message
6	# - skipping release: add [skip release] to the commit message
7	#
8	name: CI
9	
10	on:
11	  push:
12	    branches: ['main']
13	    tags: [v*]
14	  pull_request:
15	    branches: ['**']
16	
17	permissions:
18	  contents: read
19	
20	jobs:
21	  #
22	  # Main build job
23	  #
24	  java:
25	    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
26	    if: "! contains(toJSON(github.event.commits.*.message), '[skip ci]')"
27	
28	    # Definition of the build matrix
29	    strategy:
30	      matrix:
31	        java: [11, 17, 21]
32	        entry:
33	          - { mock-maker: 'mock-maker-default', member-accessor: 'member-accessor-default' }
34	          - { mock-maker: 'mock-maker-inline', member-accessor: 'member-accessor-module' }
35	          - { mock-maker: 'mock-maker-subclass', member-accessor: 'member-accessor-module' }
36	          - { mock-maker: 'mock-maker-subclass', member-accessor: 'member-accessor-reflection' }
37	          - { mock-maker: 'mock-maker-inline', member-accessor: 'member-accessor-reflection' }
38	
39	    # All build steps
40	    # SINGLE-MATRIX-JOB means that the step does not need to be executed on every job in the matrix
41	    steps:
42	
43	    - name: 1. Check out code
44	      uses: actions/checkout@v6 # https://github.com/actions/checkout
45	      with:
46	        fetch-depth: '0' # https://github.com/shipkit/shipkit-changelog#fetch-depth-on-ci
47	
48	    - name: 2. Set up Java for running Gradle build
49	      uses: actions/setup-java@v5
50	      with:
51	        distribution: 'zulu'
52	        java-version: 17
53	        cache: 'gradle'
54	
55	    - name: 3. Validate Gradle wrapper
56	      if: matrix.java == 11 && matrix.entry.mock-maker == 'mock-maker-default' # SINGLE-MATRIX-JOB
57	      uses: gradle/actions/wrapper-validation@v5 # https://github.com/gradle/wrapper-validation-action
58	
59	    - name: 4. Build and check reproducibility of artifacts (single job only)
60	      if: matrix.java == 11 && matrix.entry.mock-maker == 'mock-maker-default' # SINGLE-MATRIX-JOB
61	      run: ./check_reproducibility.sh
62	
63	    - name: 5. Spotless check (single job only). Run './gradlew spotlessApply' locally if this job fails.
64	      if: matrix.java == 11 && matrix.entry.mock-maker == 'mock-maker-default' # SINGLE-MATRIX-JOB
65	      run: >
66	        ./gradlew
67	        spotlessCheck
68	        --stacktrace
69	        --scan
70	
71	    - name: 6. Build on Java ${{ matrix.java }} with ${{ matrix.entry.mock-maker }} and ${{ matrix.entry.member-accessor }}
72	      run: >
73	        ./gradlew
74	        -Pmockito.test.java=${{ matrix.java }}
75	        build
76	        --stacktrace
77	        --scan
78	      env:
79	        MOCK_MAKER: ${{ matrix.entry.mock-maker }}
80	        MEMBER_ACCESSOR: ${{ matrix.entry.member-accessor }}
81	
82	    - name: 7. Generate coverage report
83	      run: >
84	        ./gradlew
85	        -Pmockito.test.java=${{ matrix.java }}
86	        coverageReport
87	        --stacktrace
88	        --scan
89	
90	    - name: 8. Upload coverage report
91	      uses: codecov/codecov-action@v5
92	      env:
93	        CODECOV_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.CODECOV_TOKEN }}
94	      with:
95	        files: mockito-core/build/reports/jacoco/mockitoCoverage/mockitoCoverage.xml
96	        fail_ci_if_error: true
97	
98	  #
99	  # Android build job
100	  #
101	  android:
102	    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
103	    if: "! contains(toJSON(github.event.commits.*.message), '[skip ci]')"
104	    timeout-minutes: 30
105	
106	    # Definition of the build matrix
107	    strategy:
108	      matrix:
109	        # Minimum supported and maximum available.
110	        android-api: [ 28, 33 ]
111	
112	    # All build steps
113	    steps:
114	    - name: 1. Check out code
115	      uses: actions/checkout@v6
116	      with:
117	        fetch-depth: '0' # https://github.com/shipkit/shipkit-changelog#fetch-depth-on-ci
118	
119	    - name: 2. Set up Java for running Gradle build
120	      uses: actions/setup-java@v5
121	      with:
122	        distribution: 'zulu'
123	        java-version: 17
124	        cache: 'gradle'
125	
126	    - name: 3. Enable KVM.
127	      run: |
128	        echo 'KERNEL=="kvm", GROUP="kvm", MODE="0666", OPTIONS+="static_node=kvm"' | sudo tee /etc/udev/rules.d/99-kvm4all.rules
129	        sudo udevadm control --reload-rules
130	        sudo udevadm trigger --name-match=kvm
131	
132	    - name: 4. Run Android tests on Android API level ${{ matrix.android-api }}
133	      uses: reactivecircus/android-emulator-runner@v2
134	      with:
135	        arch: x86_64
136	        api-level: ${{ matrix.android-api }}
137	        # Override default "-no-window -gpu swiftshader_indirect -no-snapshot -noaudio -no-boot-anim"
138	        # See emulator manual for reference: https://developer.android.com/studio/run/emulator-commandline
139	        emulator-options: >
140	          -no-window
141	          -gpu swiftshader_indirect
142	          -no-snapshot
143	          -noaudio
144	          -no-boot-anim
145	          -camera-back none
146	          -camera-front none
147	        # See logcat manual for reference: https://developer.android.com/studio/command-line/logcat
148	        script: |
149	          # Capture logcat output from "Launch Emulator" to a file.
150	          adb logcat -d > emulator-startup.log
151	          # Shorten the logcat output, by truncating at this point, the relevant part is yet to come.
152	          # Best effort, could fail with "failed to clear the 'main' log",
153	          # because something is locking logcat, so try a few times, and ignore errors each time.
154	          adb logcat --clear || true
155	          adb logcat --clear || true
156	          adb logcat --clear || true
157	          # Capture full logcat output to a file.
158	          adb logcat > emulator.log & echo $! > logcat_file.pid
159	          # Output instrumentation test logs to the GitHub Actions output.
160	          adb logcat "*:S MonitoringInstr:V AndroidJUnitRunner:V TestRequestBuilder:V TestExecutor:V TestRunner:V" --format=color & echo $! > logcat_console.pid
161	
162	          echo 0 > gradle.exit # Set a default exit code.
163	          # Run the actual tests (suppress build failures by saving the exit code).
164	          ./gradlew :mockito-integration-tests:android-tests:connectedCheck --no-daemon --no-build-cache || echo $? > gradle.exit
165	
166	          # Stop capturing logcat output.
167	          kill $(cat logcat_file.pid)    || echo "::warning file=.github/workflows/ci.yml::Logcat process $(cat logcat_file.pid) didn't exist."
168	          kill $(cat logcat_console.pid) || echo "::warning file=.github/workflows/ci.yml::Logcat process $(cat logcat_console.pid) didn't exist."
169	          # Make sure the step fails if the tests failed.
170	          exit $(cat gradle.exit)
171	
172	    - name: 5. Upload artifact "android-tests-results-${{ matrix.android-api }}"
173	      if: success() || failure()
174	      uses: actions/upload-artifact@v6
175	      with:
176	        name: androidTest-results-${{ matrix.android-api }}
177	        path: |

#
# CI build that assembles artifacts and runs tests.
# If validation is successful this workflow releases from the main dev branch.
#
# - skipping CI: add [skip ci] to the commit message
# - skipping release: add [skip release] to the commit message
#
name: CI

on:
  push:
    branches: ['main']
    tags: [v*]
  pull_request:
    branches: ['**']

permissions:
  contents: read

jobs:
  #
  # Main build job
  #
  java:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    if: "! contains(toJSON(github.event.commits.*.message), '[skip ci]')"

    # Definition of the build matrix
    strategy:
      matrix:
        java: [11, 17, 21]
        entry:
          - { mock-maker: 'mock-maker-default', member-accessor: 'member-accessor-default' }
          - { mock-maker: 'mock-maker-inline', member-accessor: 'member-accessor-module' }
          - { mock-maker: 'mock-maker-subclass', member-accessor: 'member-accessor-module' }
          - { mock-maker: 'mock-maker-subclass', member-accessor: 'member-accessor-reflection' }
          - { mock-maker: 'mock-maker-inline', member-accessor: 'member-accessor-reflection' }

    # All build steps
    # SINGLE-MATRIX-JOB means that the step does not need to be executed on every job in the matrix
    steps:

    - name: 1. Check out code
      uses: actions/checkout@v6 # https://github.com/actions/checkout
      with:
        fetch-depth: '0' # https://github.com/shipkit/shipkit-changelog#fetch-depth-on-ci

    - name: 2. Set up Java for running Gradle build
      uses: actions/setup-java@v5
      with:
        distribution: 'zulu'
        java-version: 17
        cache: 'gradle'

    - name: 3. Validate Gradle wrapper
      if: matrix.java == 11 && matrix.entry.mock-maker == 'mock-maker-default' # SINGLE-MATRIX-JOB
      uses: gradle/actions/wrapper-validation@v5 # https://github.com/gradle/wrapper-validation-action

    - name: 4. Build and check reproducibility of artifacts (single job only)
      if: matrix.java == 11 && matrix.entry.mock-maker == 'mock-maker-default' # SINGLE-MATRIX-JOB
      run: ./check_reproducibility.sh

    - name: 5. Spotless check (single job only). Run './gradlew spotlessApply' locally if this job fails.
      if: matrix.java == 11 && matrix.entry.mock-maker == 'mock-maker-default' # SINGLE-MATRIX-JOB
      run: >
        ./gradlew
        spotlessCheck
        --stacktrace
        --scan

    - name: 6. Build on Java ${{ matrix.java }} with ${{ matrix.entry.mock-maker }} and ${{ matrix.entry.member-accessor }}
      run: >
        ./gradlew
        -Pmockito.test.java=${{ matrix.java }}
        build
        --stacktrace
        --scan
      env:
        MOCK_MAKER: ${{ matrix.entry.mock-maker }}
        MEMBER_ACCESSOR: ${{ matrix.entry.member-accessor }}

    - name: 7. Generate coverage report
      run: >
        ./gradlew
        -Pmockito.test.java=${{ matrix.java }}
        coverageReport
        --stacktrace
        --scan

    - name: 8. Upload coverage report
      uses: codecov/codecov-action@v5
      env:
        CODECOV_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.CODECOV_TOKEN }}
      with:
        files: mockito-core/build/reports/jacoco/mockitoCoverage/mockitoCoverage.xml
        fail_ci_if_error: true

  #
  # Android build job
  #
  android:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    if: "! contains(toJSON(github.event.commits.*.message), '[skip ci]')"
    timeout-minutes: 30

    # Definition of the build matrix
    strategy:
      matrix:
        # Minimum supported and maximum available.
        android-api: [ 28, 33 ]

    # All build steps
    steps:
    - name: 1. Check out code
      uses: actions/checkout@v6
      with:
        fetch-depth: '0' # https://github.com/shipkit/shipkit-changelog#fetch-depth-on-ci

    - name: 2. Set up Java for running Gradle build
      uses: actions/setup-java@v5
      with:
        distribution: 'zulu'
        java-version: 17
        cache: 'gradle'

    - name: 3. Enable KVM.
      run: |
        echo 'KERNEL=="kvm", GROUP="kvm", MODE="0666", OPTIONS+="static_node=kvm"' | sudo tee /etc/udev/rules.d/99-kvm4all.rules
        sudo udevadm control --reload-rules
        sudo udevadm trigger --name-match=kvm

    - name: 4. Run Android tests on Android API level ${{ matrix.android-api }}
      uses: reactivecircus/android-emulator-runner@v2
      with:
        arch: x86_64
        api-level: ${{ matrix.android-api }}
        # Override default "-no-window -gpu swiftshader_indirect -no-snapshot -noaudio -no-boot-anim"
        # See emulator manual for reference: https://developer.android.com/studio/run/emulator-commandline
        emulator-options: >
          -no-window
          -gpu swiftshader_indirect
          -no-snapshot
          -noaudio
          -no-boot-anim
          -camera-back none
          -camera-front none
        # See logcat manual for reference: https://developer.android.com/studio/command-line/logcat
        script: |
          # Capture logcat output from "Launch Emulator" to a file.
          adb logcat -d > emulator-startup.log
          # Shorten the logcat output, by truncating at this point, the relevant part is yet to come.
          # Best effort, could fail with "failed to clear the 'main' log",
          # because something is locking logcat, so try a few times, and ignore errors each time.
          adb logcat --clear || true
          adb logcat --clear || true
          adb logcat --clear || true
          # Capture full logcat output to a file.
          adb logcat > emulator.log & echo $! > logcat_file.pid
          # Output instrumentation test logs to the GitHub Actions output.
          adb logcat "*:S MonitoringInstr:V AndroidJUnitRunner:V TestRequestBuilder:V TestExecutor:V TestRunner:V" --format=color & echo $! > logcat_console.pid

          echo 0 > gradle.exit # Set a default exit code.
          # Run the actual tests (suppress build failures by saving the exit code).
          ./gradlew :mockito-integration-tests:android-tests:connectedCheck --no-daemon --no-build-cache || echo $? > gradle.exit

          # Stop capturing logcat output.
          kill $(cat logcat_file.pid)    || echo "::warning file=.github/workflows/ci.yml::Logcat process $(cat logcat_file.pid) didn't exist."
          kill $(cat logcat_console.pid) || echo "::warning file=.github/workflows/ci.yml::Logcat process $(cat logcat_console.pid) didn't exist."
          # Make sure the step fails if the tests failed.
          exit $(cat gradle.exit)

    - name: 5. Upload artifact "android-tests-results-${{ matrix.android-api }}"
      if: success() || failure()
      uses: actions/upload-artifact@v6
      with:
        name: androidTest-results-${{ matrix.android-api }}
        path: |
          ${{ github.workspace }}/mockito-integration-tests/android-tests/build/reports/android-tests/connected/**
          ${{ github.workspace }}/emulator.log
          ${{ github.workspace }}/emulator-startup.log

    # :mockito-integration-tests:android-tests:connectedCheck (which depends on :mockito-integration-tests:android-tests:createDebugAndroidTestCoverageReport) already generated coverage report.
    - name: 6. Upload coverage report
      uses: codecov/codecov-action@v5
      env:
        CODECOV_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.CODECOV_TOKEN }}
      with:
        files: mockito-integration-tests/android-tests/build/reports/coverage/android-tests/debug/connected/report.xml
        fail_ci_if_error: true

  #
  # GraalVM native tests job
  #
  graalvm:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    if: "! contains(toJSON(github.event.commits.*.message), '[skip ci]')"

    steps:
    - name: 1. Check out code
      uses: actions/checkout@v6
      with:
        fetch-depth: '0'

    - name: 2. Setup GraalVM
      uses: graalvm/setup-graalvm@v1.4.5
      with:
        java-version: "21"
        distribution: "graalvm"
        cache: gradle

    - name: 3. Run GraalVM native tests with metadata
      run: ./gradlew :mockito-integration-tests:graalvm-tests:nativeTest -PenableGraalTracingAgent --scan

    - name: 4. Verify GraalVM metadata generation
      run: |
        REFLECT_CONFIG="mockito-integration-tests/graalvm-tests/src/test/resources/META-INF/native-image/org.mockito/graalvm-tests/reflect-config.json"
        test -f "$REFLECT_CONFIG" || {
          echo "reflect-config.json not found at $REFLECT_CONFIG"
          exit 1
        }
        grep -q "org\.mockito\.internal\.creation\.bytebuddy\.codegen\.DummyObject\$MockitoMock" "$REFLECT_CONFIG" || {
          echo "DummyObject mock not found in reflect-config.json"
          exit 1
        }

  #
  # Release job, only for pushes to the main development branch
  #
  release:
    permissions:
      contents: write
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: [java, android, graalvm] # all build jobs must pass before we can release

    if: github.event_name == 'push'
        && (github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' || startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/tags/v'))
        && github.repository == 'mockito/mockito'
        && !contains(toJSON(github.event.commits.*.message), '[skip release]')

    steps:

      - name: 1. Check out code
        uses: actions/checkout@v6 # https://github.com/actions/checkout
        with:
          fetch-depth: '0' # https://github.com/shipkit/shipkit-changelog#fetch-depth-on-ci

      - name: 2. Set up Java for running Gradle build
        uses: actions/setup-java@v5
        with:
          distribution: 'zulu'
          java-version: 21
          cache: 'gradle'

      - name: 3. Build and release
        run: >
          ./gradlew
          githubRelease
          publishToSonatype
          closeAndReleaseStagingRepositories
          releaseSummary
          --info
          --stacktrace
        env:
          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN}}
          NEXUS_TOKEN_USER: ${{secrets.NEXUS_TOKEN_USER}}
          NEXUS_TOKEN_PWD: ${{secrets.NEXUS_TOKEN_PWD}}
          PGP_KEY: ${{secrets.PGP_KEY}}
          PGP_PWD: ${{secrets.PGP_PWD}}

FROM ubuntu:22.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# Install system dependencies and Java 17 (for running Gradle)
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    git \
    curl \
    ca-certificates \
    openjdk-17-jdk \
    openjdk-11-jdk \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /app

# Copy the repository
COPY repo/ /app/

# Copy the run script
COPY run.sh /run.sh
RUN chmod +x /run.sh

# Set environment variables for the build
ENV JAVA_HOME=/usr/lib/jvm/java-17-openjdk-amd64
ENV PATH=$JAVA_HOME/bin:$PATH
ENV MOCK_MAKER=mock-maker-inline
ENV MEMBER_ACCESSOR=member-accessor-module

ENTRYPOINT ["/run.sh"]
